subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter was presented before the countenance of the Wronged One, and was favored with His perusal and attention. That which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله نامه ات امام وجه مظلوم حاضر و بمشاهده و اصغا فائز آنچه درباره
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for prosperity
